species: It is not present in isoform 2 of human PDK1.
sample_source: PDK1SKD (73–359), PDK1LKD (73–389), N-terminal PIFtide SKD (PDK1PIF-SKD) or LKD (PDK1PIF-LKD) fusion, and C-terminal PIFtide SKD (PDK1SKD-PIF) fusion were cloned into the pFastBac Dual expression vector with an N-terminal GST-tag for expression in baculovirus-infected Sf9 insect cells.
cell_line: expression in baculovirus-infected Sf9 insect cells.
